message:
feat(mcp): Add suggest, feedback, index, validate, config tools

Enhance the MCP server with additional tools for better agent integration:

- suggest: Context-aware skill suggestions based on project detection
- feedback: Record skill usage feedback (helpful/not helpful)
- index: Report configured skill paths and skill counts
- validate: Validate SKILL.md content against all lint rules
- config: Read-only access to configuration values

Includes 12 new unit tests for tool schemas and helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
